pr.title: [10min_16mb] 0.9641 BPB: LeakyReLU² + Score-First TTT + N-gram Backoff Cache

output.summary: 11L GQA transformer with LeakyReLU², VE, and gated attention uses score-first legal TTT plus entropy-scaled Laplace-smoothed n-gram backoff cache.
techniques: Score-first legal TTT using SGD updates after backward scoring
Entropy-adaptive Laplace-smoothed multi-order n-gram backoff cache
Int6 per-row quantization with Muon+Adam optimizer split
